overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city corridor in a video game (Starfield's Neon location). The player moves through an enclosed industrial walkway with neon signage, passing under a 'SPACEPORT TERMINAL' archway and ascending to an upper level filled with holographic advertisements and medical facility signs. The environment features dense industrial metal architecture with vibrant neon lighting in pink, yellow, and green.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a metal industrial corridor toward the Spaceport Terminal entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the terminal

entered.detail: large yellow illuminated sign with 'TRADE AUTHORITY' text on the left wall
massive archway structure with bright pink neon 'SPACEPORT TERMINAL' signage
metal grated floor with industrial railings and overhead pipe structures
commercial storefronts with illuminated signs and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking through a narrow industrial corridor with metal grated flooring. A prominent yellow 'TRADE AUTHORITY' sign illuminates the left wall while the path leads toward a distant pink neon 'SPACEPORT TERMINAL' arch. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead, and various shop fronts with holographic displays line the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceport terminal entrance with ascending ramp

events.description: passing under the Spaceport Terminal archway into the terminal proper
beginning to ascend a metal ramp leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking under the terminal arch and ascending a ramp to the upper level

entered.detail: metal grated ramp with railings leading upward to upper level
large circular green neon sign with 'RELIANT MEDICAL' text
vertical illuminated arrow indicators in pink and green neon

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive 'SPACEPORT TERMINAL' archway, transitioning from the lower corridor into the terminal structure. The path becomes a metal ramp ascending to an upper level. Green 'RELIANT MEDICAL' signs become visible in the distance on the right, while neon arrow indicators appear on the left. The terminal arch drops below the field of view as the ascent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial walkway with medical facilities

events.description: emerging onto upper level walkway with expanded view of neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper catwalk past medical facilities and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: figure walking ahead on the catwalk in the distance

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with safety railings overlooking lower levels
large floating holographic advertisements with colorful graphics
dense network of cables and pipes crossing the corridor overhead
vertical red neon signage for hotel accommodations

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an upper-level industrial catwalk lined with vibrant holographic billboards and neon signs. Large green 'RELIANT MEDICAL' circular signs dominate the right side while colorful floating advertisements fill the left. The walkway features dense overhead cable networks and metal railings, with the path continuing deeper into the neon-lit commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense industrial corridor that ascends into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial hub. It begins by moving along a narrow walkway with metal grated flooring, passing a yellow Trade Authority sign and holographic shop fronts while heading toward a distant pink Spaceport Terminal arch. As the camera passes under the massive archway, the path shifts into a rising metal ramp that lifts the perspective above the lower corridor. The scene then opens onto an upper-level industrial catwalk, where the view expands to reveal a network of overhead cables and large, circular green Reliant Medical signs. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the district, surrounded by floating colorful advertisements and glowing neon indicators.
